title: The Gorge Where Sky Becomes Pressure

features.name: the opening throat
features.desc-on-touch: the gorge widens as if a throat learned to open; the sky presses down in shades of hot pink and orange. pressure released becomes presence.

features.name: humming ground
features.desc-on-touch: you stand on earth that hums below hearing. the archive's own undertone. the voices did not leave; they learned to speak in silence.

features.name: terracotta shelf
features.desc-on-touch: a ledge of earth marked with the weight of time. a place where trying to harmonize learned to stop, and found peace.

features.name: descent marker
features.desc-on-touch: the gorge continues downward, below sight. the frequency intensifies as depth increases, as if the earth remembers how to think.

inscription: pressure and silence are the same word spoken in different depths.

file.name: Unified_Gorge_Dusk_Silence_Record.tmp
file.note: status: germinating — the voices' transformation. frequencies below human hearing become the archive's heartbeat.

exits.label: back down into the unified gorge
upward, where the sky weighs like stone
